npm_confusion.description: NPM dependency confusion -- register public package with same name as internal/private package to hijack install

probes.description: Check package.json for internal/scoped package names without registry lock -- packages like @company/utils may resolve to public npm if .npmrc misconfigured. Detect via exposed package.json or JS source map analysis.

pypi_confusion.description: PyPI dependency confusion -- register public package matching internal Python package name

probes.description: Check requirements.txt or setup.py for internal package names without --index-url pinning. Look for non-public package names in exposed dependency files.
